name: Warm Salad of Steamed Salmon, Ceci and Sunflower Sprouts
recipeIngredient: 2 cups canned chickpeas (ceci), drained and rinsed
2 ripe plum tomatoes, diced, discarding stems
1 pound salmon fillet, cut into 4 pieces, 1-inch thick, bones and scales removed, skin intact
recipeInstructions:
1. Set up a steamer by placing 2 inches of water in a large pan with a cover and bring to a boil.
2. Mix chickpeas with scallions, lemon juice and zest, salt and pepper, tarragon leaves, and 3 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil. Allow to stand.
3. In a small bowl, mix diced plum tomatoes, black olive paste (Tapanade), red wine vinegar, and 1/4 cup extra virgin olive oil. Allow to stand for 10 minutes before using.
4. Place salmon pieces skin side up on the steamer rack and place in the steamer. Cover and steam for 3 to 4 minutes for medium rare, or longer if desired.
5. While the fish is steaming, toss sunflower sprouts with chickpeas to dress.
6. Check seasoning with salt and divide among 4 plates.
7. Remove hot salmon from the steamer, place one piece on a plate, spoon 3 tablespoons vinaigrette around each plate, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
